source.criteria: The mappable proxy that represents the geological features related to the source of MVT Zinc Lead deposits could be the distribution of evaporites and the presence of stratified basins.

source.criteria: The mappable proxy that represents the geological features related to the source of MVT Zinc Lead deposits is the distribution of lead isotopes in the basement rocks and sedimentary rocks derived from the basement.

pathway.criteria: The mappable proxy that represents the geological features related to the pathway of MVT Zinc Lead deposits could be the distribution and orientation of extensional faults and fractures within the host rocks.
